geography.data_source: Thane Municipal Corporation ward boundaries; area from TMC Development Plan 2034; 10 ward committees covering Thane city

demographics.data_source: Census 2011 Thane city; density = population/area; household size from NSSO 76th Round Thane urban estimates; literacy from Census 2011 Thane district urban; SC/ST from Census 2011

income_profile.data_source: Median from PLFS 2022-23 Thane urban area; distribution reflecting satellite city mid-income character with growing IT sector (Wagle Estate, Kolshet); informal rate from NSSO 78th Round Thane district; occupations from MIDC Wagle Estate employment data and TMC economic survey

commute_profile.data_source: Very long commute for those working in Mumbai island city; Thane station is a major Central Railway junction; no metro lines currently reach Thane; MCTS 2016 + TMC transport survey; car ownership higher than Mumbai average reflecting satellite city character with wider roads

sensitivity_parameters.data_source: Higher fare sensitivity due to long commute costs; lower railway trust from chronic Central Railway overcrowding and delays; exam sensitivity from educational institution density; Lokniti-CSDS 2024 Thane sub-sample; political data from Thane city Assembly constituencies 2024

social_network_parameters.data_source: Housing society-based networks similar to Borivali but with distinct Thane civic identity; clustering from cooperative housing societies; cross-income bridging moderate; lower tier2 density reflecting satellite city political structure

informal_economy_nodes.data_source: Vendors around Thane station; footfall from Central Railway Thane station boarding data (~700K daily); major transit interchange
Informal service economy around Viviana Mall and Eastern Express Highway commercial belt; estimated from mall footfall data and BEST Thane route ridership
Wagle Estate MIDC industrial area; MIDC employment data; includes food stalls and transport services for factory workers
Naupada market — traditional retail centre of Thane city; TMC market survey and trade license data
Informal economy around Talao Pali (Masunda Lake) recreation area; food stalls, boat operators; TMC tourism data
Vendors serving new residential developments along Ghodbunder Road; estimated from TMC building permissions and population growth in area

tier1_agent_archetype_weights.data_source: Middle Income Residential template from AGENT_SPEC.md; Thane is a satellite city with strong residential character; sum = 1.00 (journalist_tier1 trace removed, weight absorbed)

tier2_agent_types.data_source: Tier 2 counts from TMC elected representatives (higher count as separate municipal corporation), Thane Journalists Association, MIDC union records, and housing society federation data
